reviewing: The prior in-session review is void. Do not start another review. Commit the validated staged diff, push every local commit, and ensure a non-draft PR exists before yielding.
review-required: The PR head shifted before review started. Run one synchronous local review against the new head, then continue verification and shipping.
coverage-check: Resume coverage analysis for changed files.
e2e-testing: Resume e2e testing. Restart dev server if needed.
ci-watch: Resume CI monitoring. Run gh pr checks and fix any failures.
bot-watching: Resume bot approval polling (Step 11). Check discovered bots for approval status. If bots request changes, go to Step 12. If all approved, go to Step 13.
addressing: Resume addressing bot review feedback (Steps 2-11 of address-review). After fixes, return to CI watch.
merging: Verify CI green and bot approval, then merge the PR.
